name: Wicabel
description:
"Blood dripping from the bed to a neatly written poem. Heartfelt last line reading"

Medicine Bottle ‐Red House Painters

Requested? | Yes, by @RoxyGaming, thank you for your request!

Image: @WolfKIce on twitter / X

I've been avoiding spoilers (badly) for Deltarune, since I've only played the demo cause I'm POOR. I wanted to play ch 3 and 4 myself first, but I'd say I do this, so looking at all the content I can find.

MOSTLY written before I watched any video, just based off vibes. Looked up songs sung by a soft voice and found this, it's real good.

MAN THERE IS ALMOST NOTHING ABOUT HER FULL VIBES THEN

She looks pretty, so I'm just doing a full first meeting kind of scenario, though not a battle. Warning, she is TALL, cause she reminds me of a church bell on the towers, and those are big

This was tough but I've endured worse from my old 6th grade middle school fanfiction writing days in good ol' 2017

WARNING: I DID NOT WATCH A PLAYTHOUGH, JUST WATCHED INFORMATION OF WICABEL, SOME STUFF WILL BE MADE UP!!! If you want to explain what happens to me, feel free, I will update it! Just don't complain without telling me why!
creator: Amorflos
